nasb.text: Remind them to be subject to rulers, to authorities, to be obedient, to be ready for every good deed,

esv.text: Remind them to be submissive to rulers and authorities, to be obedient, to be ready for every good work,

cnv.text: 你要提醒他們服從執政的和掌權的，聽從他們，隨時準備作各種善工。

ccb.text: 你要提醒众人顺服执政掌权者，遵守法令，随时准备做善事。

csbs.text: 你提醒他们要服从统治者和掌权者，要顺从，并要为一切美善的工作做好准备；
